subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be My Glory! Today, His honor Seyyed Mustafa, upon him be My Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک بهائی الیوم باید جناب سید مصطفی علیه بهائی
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
